title: openpouch logs result
description: `openpouch logs --json [--limit N]` / MCP `openpouch_logs`. On the instant lane the lines carry the captured install/build/app phases (tagged [install]/[build]/[app], sanitized — ANSI escapes and control chars except tab stripped, real per-line timestamps) — the self-repair loop reads the CAUSE here. Contract: `required` guaranteed, additive evolution.

requestedLimit.description: Echo of the effective --limit (default 50). count < requestedLimit means the full available tail was returned — there is no pagination. Present from the release after 0.2.15 (additive).
